meaning: n.(乡间)小路,巷,里弄,狭窄的通道,航线
examples: The road is only one lane wide.
She signalled and pulled over into the slow lane.
The truck was travelling at 20 mph in the slow lane.
Highway 2 is a ribbon of two-lane road that stretches across the entirety of Washington state.
By 2010 they will have probably 40, 000 to 45, 000 miles of four-lane or five-lane highways.
